deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'python manage.py attach_yandex_env_to_fleet "New Taxi" --owner-phone 577775892 || true; python manage.py attach_bog_env_to_fleet "New Taxi" --owner-phone 577775892 || true; last_reconciliation=0; while true; do python manage.py import_yandex_driver_balance "New Taxi" 577775892 || true; python manage.py run_integration_sync_jobs --job bog_deposits --fleet-name "New Taxi" || true; python manage.py submit_pending_bog_payouts --fleet-name "New Taxi" || true; python manage.py submit_pending_yandex_withdrawals --fleet-name "New Taxi" || true; python manage.py run_integration_sync_jobs --job bog_payouts --fleet-name "New Taxi" || true; now=$(date +%s); if [ $((now - last_reconciliation)) -ge 3600 ]; then python manage.py run_integration_sync_jobs --job bog_source_reconciliation --fleet-name "New Taxi" || true; last_reconciliation=$now; fi; sleep 10; done'
